message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class Creator {
    <<interface>>
    + SceneManager makeScene(QJsonObject spec)
    # Table makeTable(QJsonObject spec)
    # Ball makeBall(QJsonObject spec)
}

class SimpleCreator {
    # Table makeTable(QJsonObject spec)
    # Ball makeBall(QJsonObject spec)
}

class SceneBuilder {
    + void setTable(Table)
    + void addBall(Ball)
    + void resetBalls()
    + SceneManager build()
}

class MainWindow {
    - QTimer updater
    - QTimer ticker
    - QElapsedTimer timer
    - SceneManager scene
    + void paintEvent(QPaintEvent event)
    ---
    slots
    + void tick()
    + void nextFrame()
}

class SceneManager {
    - Table table
    - vector<Ball> balls
    - QPoint offset
    ---
    QSize viewPort()
    void tick(float dtime)
    void draw(QPainter painter)
}

class Graphic {
    <<interface>>
    + void draw(QPainter painter)
}

class Table {
    + QSize dimension
    + float surface_friction
}

class SimpleTable {
    - QColor color
    + void draw(QPainter painter)
}

class Ball {
    + float mass
    + QVector2D position
    + QVector2D velocity
    + float radius
}

class SimpleBall {
    - QColor color
    + void draw(QPainter painter)
}

' Relationships
Creator <|-- SimpleCreator
Creator --> SceneBuilder
SceneBuilder ..> SceneManager
MainWindow *-- SceneManager
SceneManager *-- Table
SceneManager *-- Ball
Graphic <|.. Table
Graphic <|.. Ball
Table <|-- SimpleTable
Ball <|-- SimpleBall
SimpleCreator ..> SimpleTable
SimpleCreator ..> SimpleBall

' Styling
hide circle
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam class {
    BackgroundColor White
    BorderColor Black
}
skinparam interface {
    BackgroundColor White
    BorderColor Black
}
skinparam legend {
    BackgroundColor Yellow
    BorderColor DarkGoldenrod
}

legend right
    o public
    \u25C7 protected
    \u25A1 private
    --
    o publiic method()
    \u25C7 protected method()
    \u25A1 private method()
endlegend

@enduml
```
